commit.message:
feat: add seqlock rollout guard contract (bd-1lsy.7.21.3) and harden guardplane replay command resolution

Seqlock rollout guard (new):
- docs/RGC_SEQLOCK_ROLLOUT_GUARD_V1.md: Full contract specification for
  gating seqlock-backed rollout on deterministic safety-case evidence,
  starvation microbench results, and loom/model-check coverage. Fails
  closed until positive model-check coverage exists for accepted candidates.
- scripts/run_seqlock_rollout_guard_suite.sh: CI-compatible suite runner
  (rch-backed check + test + clippy + bundle emission)
- scripts/e2e/seqlock_rollout_guard_replay.sh: Deterministic replay wrapper
  for the rollout guard suite

Seqlock reader/writer contract (updates):
- docs/RGC_SEQLOCK_READER_WRITER_CONTRACT_V1.md: Expand contract with
  additional retry budget and incumbent fallback documentation

Extension host guardplane replay (hardening):
- Add GUARDPLANE_REPLAY_COMMAND_SPACE_SENTINEL for encoded environment
  variable support, allowing replay commands with spaces to be passed
  via FE_GUARDPLANE_REPLAY_COMMAND_ENCODED with sentinel-based space
  encoding, falling back to FE_GUARDPLANE_REPLAY_COMMAND or default
- Extract guardplane_replay_command_from_env() helper in delegate cell tests
- Update run_guardplane_policy_actions_suite.sh for compatibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite auth flow and MyPage to fix login/logout/loading issues

AuthContext: use async/await with try/finally, isMounted guard, useCallback
MyPage: fix Hooks order violation, stable deps, proper logout flow
Auth: redirect on user (not user+role) so RLS role failure doesn't block
Header: unify logout redirect to /auth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add frankenctl React CLI subcommands and extend native addon membrane with risk classification, symbol families, and owner routing

frankenctl React CLI (new subcommands):
- react compile: Compile React/JSX source through the franken-engine
  lowering pipeline with configurable source form (jsx/tsx/esm) and
  runtime mode, emitting structured compilation artifacts with trace,
  decision, and policy IDs for audit
- react build: End-to-end React build targeting cjs/esm/iife outputs
  with bundled artifact emission
- react contract: Emit the embedded React capability contract JSON
  (rgc_react_capability_contract_v1.json) for toolchain integration

Native addon membrane enhancements:
- Add NativeAddonRiskClassification enum (Low/Medium/High/Critical) with
  serde support for categorizing addon safety profiles
- Add symbol_families() method to NativeAddonLoadRequest for extracting
  deduplicated symbol class families from exported symbols
- Extend NativeAddonSupportSurface with symbol_families, risk_classification,
  owner_route, and remediation_hint fields for richer addon metadata
- Update canonical_value() serialization to include new fields

Test updates for frankenctl CLI, native addon membrane integration, and
baseline interpreter edge cases to cover new functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: franken_engine
repository.description: Native Rust runtime for adversarial extension workloads with deterministic replay, cryptographic decision receipts, and fleet-scale containment.

commit.message:
feat: add 6 new engine subsystem modules with integration tests

Introduces six new runtime subsystem modules to the franken-engine crate,
expanding the engine's capability surface for law promotion, metadata
optimization, JSX lowering, resource certificate consumption, semantic
canonical basis computation, and trace fusion.

New modules:
- law_promotion_pack.rs: Law promotion pack assembly and validation for
  policy-driven runtime transformations
- optimized_metadata_substrate.rs: Optimized metadata substrate layer
  providing efficient metadata storage and retrieval for engine internals
- react_jsx_lowering.rs: React JSX lowering pass that transforms JSX
  AST nodes into franken-engine IR, supporting component resolution and
  element construction
- resource_certificate_consumer.rs: Resource certificate consumer that
  validates and applies certificate-based resource authorization
- semantic_canonical_basis.rs: Semantic canonical basis computation for
  deterministic normalization of engine semantic representations
- trace_fusion.rs: Trace fusion engine that merges and optimizes runtime
  execution traces for performance analysis and replay

All modules registered in lib.rs. Three new integration test suites
added for optimized_metadata_substrate, semantic_canonical_basis, and
trace_fusion modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: pixel art graphics — replace placeholder visuals (#14)

* chore: add GRAPHICS_PROMPT.md for art agent guidance

Documents art style (pixel art, top-down, Stardew Valley-ish), color
palette, all lot visual states (empty, hover, L1/L2 trailer, locked,
invalid flash), UI elements, and export requirements.

Unlocked by Milestone 4 completion per CLAUDE.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: replace placeholder graphics with pixel art sprites

Generates and integrates pixel art assets per prompts/GRAPHICS_PROMPT.md:

Sprites (game/assets/sprites/):
- lot_empty.png     — cracked dirt tile with pebbles and dry grass
- trailer_l1.png    — cream single-wide with windows, antenna, skirting
- trailer_l2.png    — gold upgraded trailer with flower box and awning
- icon_lock.png     — padlock with gold shackle for locked lots
- bg_park.png       — park background with fence, water tower, palm tree

UI icons (game/assets/ui/):
- icon_coin.png     — gold coin with $ symbol
- icon_account.png  — person silhouette for account button
- icon_quest.png    — parchment scroll with star badge

Code changes:
- LotGrid.gd: loads textures in _ready(), uses draw_texture_rect() for
  lot tiles and trailers, draws lock icon centered on locked lots,
  sets TEXTURE_FILTER_NEAREST for crisp pixel art rendering
- Main.tscn: replaces green ColorRect background with park background
  Sprite2D; keeps dark ColorRect underneath for screen edges

tools/generate_sprites.py saved for future sprite regeneration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: load sprites via Image.load_from_file to bypass import system

Godot requires the editor to run once to generate .import files before
load() can find PNG resources. Using Image.load_from_file() +
ImageTexture.create_from_image() reads PNGs directly without import
files. Same fix applied to bg_park.png in Main.gd.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: revert to load() now that .import files exist

Godot editor generated .import sidecar files for all PNG assets.
Switching back from Image.load_from_file() to load() ensures sprites
work correctly on mobile export (APK/IPA).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Migrate endOperatePhase to server

Phase transition from operate to build is now server-authoritative.
Server validates it's the correct player's turn and phase, then
resets build limits and broadcasts the phase change to all clients.

commit.message:
feat: Milestone 4 — Firebase auth and cloud save (#11)

* feat: Milestone 4 — Firebase auth and cloud save

Adds anonymous sign-in, email/password account creation, and Firestore
cloud save so players can back up progress and restore it on a new device.

Changes:
- FirebaseAuth autoload: anonymous sign-in, token refresh, email/password
  sign-in and sign-up, account linking (anonymous → email), social login
  stubs (Apple/Google/Facebook show "Coming soon")
- CloudSave autoload: upload/download save document to Firestore REST API;
  stores entire save as a JSON string in a single Firestore field to avoid
  deeply nested type-map complexity
- SaveSystem: adds saved_at Unix timestamp to every save, emits
  local_save_completed signal, adds apply_cloud_data() for conflict resolution
- Main: connects auth_state_changed → CloudSave.download() on startup;
  on cloud download, picks newer save by saved_at; fires CloudSave.upload()
  after every local save (fire-and-forget)
- AuthScreen scene + script: email/password form, social login stubs,
  opened via "Account" button in UI
- game/data/firebase_config.json: placeholder config (user must fill in
  api_key and project_id from Firebase Console)
- backend/firestore.rules: security rules — users can only access their own
  document at users/{uid}/save/game
- project.godot: registers FirebaseAuth and CloudSave as autoloads

Social auth via native SDK is deferred to Milestone 4b.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: auth screen alignment, startup gate, and Play as Guest

Three bugs fixed:

1. AuthScreen was added to Main (Node2D) instead of \$UI (CanvasLayer),
   causing Controls to render in world space instead of screen space.
   Now added to the CanvasLayer so it centers correctly on screen.

2. FirebaseAuth auto-signed in anonymously on startup with no user prompt.
   Now emits needs_auth signal when no stored token exists, and Main wires
   that to show AuthScreen before the player can proceed.

3. No "Play as Guest" option existed. Added GuestButton that calls
   FirebaseAuth.sign_in_as_guest() (anonymous sign-in). AuthScreen
   closes automatically when auth_state_changed fires.

AuthScreen also gains a semi-transparent overlay blocker, a Close button
(only visible when opened from the Account button, not on first launch),
and proper form enable/disable during async auth calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add Terraform for Firebase infrastructure provisioning

Adds backend/terraform/ with HCL configs that provision the entire Firebase
backend from a single `terraform apply`:
- GCP project + 6 required APIs
- Firebase project + web app registration
- Firestore database (native mode, us-central)
- Identity Platform: anonymous + email/password auth
- Firestore security rules deployment
- Writes game/data/firebase_config.json with real api_key/project_id

Replaces the previous manual Firebase Console + CLI setup flow.
Updates backend/README.md with Terraform usage instructions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: add bootstrap script for Service Usage API chicken-and-egg

On a brand-new GCP project, Terraform cannot enable APIs because the
Service Usage API itself isn't enabled yet. bootstrap.sh breaks the
cycle with a one-time gcloud call before the first terraform apply.

Also documents the prerequisite step in backend/README.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: correct Firestore region from us-central to us-central1

us-central is not a valid Firestore location ID. Valid single-region
values include us-central1, us-east1, etc. Multi-region: nam5 (US),
eur3 (EU).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: skip anonymous linking on Create Account — use signUp directly

Identity Platform blocks accounts:update (anonymous→email link) with
OPERATION_NOT_ALLOWED when email verification is required. Simplify by
always calling accounts:signUp for new email accounts. Local save data
persists on device and uploads to the new account's cloud doc after
sign-up, so no progress is lost.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address critical and high security findings from audit

Critical:
- Commit root .gitignore with game/data/firebase_config.json excluded —
  prevents the real Firebase API key (written by Terraform) from ever
  entering git history
- Remove game/data/firebase_config.json from git tracking (git rm --cached);
  file remains on disk, gitignore prevents re-addition

High:
- Add GCS remote backend config to main.tf so terraform.tfstate (which
  contains the SCRYPT password signer key) is stored in GCS instead of
  local disk; adds google_storage_bucket.tf_state resource
- Update bootstrap.sh with guided 3-step state migration flow
- Fix backend/terraform/.gitignore: clarify .terraform.lock.hcl status,
  keep *.tfstate excluded

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use project_id prefix for GCS state bucket; update system prompt

- GCS bucket names are globally unique; fixed name caused 409 conflict.
  Switching to ${var.project_id}-tf-state ensures uniqueness per project.
- Update CLAUDE_SYSTEM_PROMPT.md with simplified repo structure section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Fix progress dialog blinking, stage handler freezing, and viewer controls layout

Progress dialog: only reset per-tile bar on new workflow start (not every
gauge callback), fix off-by-one in overall label.

Stage handler: add try/except to prevent silent error swallowing, add
_viz_initial_pending flag to skip expensive transforms until first viz
update completes (prevents 3+ minute GUI freeze after tile workflows).

Viewer Controls: wrap channel tab in QScrollArea for 8-channel support,
compact to 2-row layout per channel (visibility+colormap+opacity / contrast).

Add diagnostic logging to _update_visualization for debugging display issues.

commit.message:
fix: progressive extraction crash + GUI safety audit

Fix extract_progressive() crash where _post_process() tuple return
wasn't unpacked in partial results path, causing "'list' object has
no attribute 'get'" error. Also add filtered terms section, per-doc
tracking, and re-entrancy guards across all vulnerable UI buttons.

Bug fix:
- vocabulary_extractor.py: unpack (vocab, filtered) tuple in partial
  results path of extract_progressive()

Filtered terms feature:
- Vocabulary extractor returns (vocab, filtered) tuples throughout
- Person names no longer exempt from min-occurrences filter
- Collapsed "Filtered out (N terms)" section in Vocabulary tab
- IPC ner_complete message carries {vocab, filtered} dict payload

GUI safety audit:
- corpus_dialog: _operation_in_progress guard on 6 methods (new,
  delete, combine, add files, preprocess all, remove files)
- dynamic_output: _open_guarded_dialog() prevents duplicate dialogs
  for score explanation, alternatives, and context viewer
- qa_panel: _edit_dialog_open guard on Edit Questions button
- Existing guards verified: _processing_active, _preprocessing_active,
  _exporting_vocab, _exporting_qa, _settings_dialog_open, filtered
  section 300ms debounce

commit.message:
feat: add frankenlab gap matrices, semantic cover schema, semantic flattening inventory; fix test assertions

New modules:
- frankenlab_gap_matrix.rs (1382 lines): authoritative gap matrix between
  local deterministic lab/release-gate surfaces and upstream
  frankenlab/LabRuntime/oracle capabilities, with per-cell migration
  decisions (direct adoption, thin bridge, maintained wrapper, deferred)
- frankenlab_surface_gap_matrix.rs (1087 lines): surface-level gap
  inventory mapping local capabilities against upstream equivalents,
  classifying each as Covered, Partial, Missing, or LocalOnly with
  migration decision encoding
- semantic_cover_schema.rs (1198 lines): semantic cover and overlap
  restriction maps for cross-surface support reasoning (RGC-808A),
  defining support scopes per engine surface (parser, lowering, runtime,
  module, TS, React, CLI) with overlap constraint enforcement
- semantic_flattening_inventory.rs (987 lines): systematic inventory of
  every boundary where Budget, Outcome, capability, severity, or
  diagnostics are preserved/collapsed/translated, classifying each as
  intentional, must-fix, acceptable, or false positive

Test improvements:
- persistent_cache_contract_integration.rs: convert fragile serde
  round-trip assertions to serialize-only checks (assert JSON contains
  expected variant names/fields) — more robust against internal
  representation changes while still verifying serialization correctness
- workload_embedding_integration.rs: remove unused CatalogEntry import,
  reformat import block per rustfmt

New integration test suites:
- frankenlab_surface_gap_matrix_integration.rs (738 lines)
- semantic_flattening_inventory_integration.rs (762 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
